close_reason: E2E harness complete with assertions.sh, setup.sh, runner.sh, and GitHub Actions CI workflow
description:
Build the infrastructure for running e2e tests:

1. NixOS container/VM provisioning (nixos-generators or similar)
2. Test runner script that executes scenarios
3. Assertion helpers for verifying outcomes
4. Logging and artifact collection
5. Integration with CI (GitHub Actions)
6. Parallel test execution for speed

Consider: Nix flake checks, nixosTests, or custom shell scripts
title: E2E: Test harness infrastructure
